metadata.description: Automate every repetitive Android dev task — keystore, signing, Gradle, version management, and new app scaffolding.

plugins.name: droidforge
plugins.description: Automate every repetitive Android dev task — keystore creation, signing config, version bumping, Gradle version catalog management, new app scaffolding, and release checklists. Run /droidforge:setup once per project. All commands use your saved config automatically.
